page_title: Bhutan - High Value, Low Volume | Alpen Glow Tours and Travels
title: Bhutan - High Value, Low Volume
overview_paragraphs: Bhutan caps the number of tourists it lets in every year, and it shows — no billboards, no traffic jams, and a monastery clinging to a cliff face that looks unreal until you're standing in front of it. This is the only country that measures Gross National Happiness instead of GDP, and the pace of this trip reflects that philosophy.
Best for travelers who want a culturally immersive trip with genuine scarcity value, not a beach-and-pool holiday.
